raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Affinu-Atreebejs
winnu us Ahrapuffi tahs Roh-
beschas fawa Gelbeschanas-Pils-
fahfa atraddis / ja tad tas Affi-
nu-Atreebejs winnu nokaus / tad
tam ne buhs pee winna Affins
noseedſigam buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tam bij buhtfawa Gel-
befchanas-Pilsfahta palikt / ka-
mebr tas Augsts-Preesteris mir-
ris ; bet pehz ta Augsta-Preestera
Mirſchanas buhs tam Noſitte-
jam us fawu ihpaſchu Semmi at-
greestees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un schahs Leetas laid juws
irr par weenu Teefas Likkumu pee
juhfu Pehznahkameem / juhsâs
Mahju-Weetâs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jkweens kas kahdu Zilwe-
ku notitt/ tad buhs pehz to Wahr-
du (diwi) Leezineeku tam Slep-
kawam nokantam tapt / bet wee-
nam paſcham Leezineekam ne buhs
Leezibn doht prett kahdu Zilweku/
ka tam bij mirt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tew ar ne buhs ne kahdu
Makfu xemt par to Slepkawu/
kas to Nahwi nopelnijis / jo tam
buhs nokantam tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Juws arr ne buhs ne kah-
du Makfu xemt par to / kas fa-
wa Gelbeschanas-Pilsfahta no-
behdsis irr / ka tas buhtu attat
nahzs dshwoht tai Semmê fa-
wa Ihpaſchuma / pirms tas
Augsts-Preesteris mirft.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Juws arr ne buhs to
Semmi fagahniht/ eekſch ka juhs
effat / jo tas tahds Affins fagah-
na to Semmi / un par to Sem-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "mi ne warr Saluhojmaſchimu uu-
tift ta Affins deht/ kas eekſch tah-
isleets irr/ ka ween zaur ta paſcha
Affini/ kas toislehjis irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nu ne fagahutjeet to
Semmi/ eekſch ka juhs dshwojat/
ka Widdû es dshwoju / jo es ef-
mu tas KUNGS / dshwodams
Israêta Behrnu Starpâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXXVI. Nodalla.
To Gileada Behrnu Luhgſchana Zelaiveada
Meitu Jhpachama deht : 1/2. Pahr to tee-
fa Mohsus ka ne weenam buhs zitta Ziltâ
prezzeht: r.
N tee augstee Tehwee
M ta Gileada Behrnu
Radda/Makira Dehla/
Manaffus Dehla/no teem Jah-
sepa Dehla Raddeem/ peegahje
un runnaja preekſch Mohsu/ un
preekſch to Israêta Behrnu aug-
stajo Tehwo Wirtnnekeem / un
Jazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Mans Kungs/tas KUNgs
irr pawehlejis to Semmi par
Ihpaſchumu zaur Mesloſchann
teem Israêta Behrneem isdoht /
un mannam Kungam irr zaur to
KUNGU pawehlehts / to Ihpa-
tchunni muhtn BrahtaZelaiveada
winna Meitahn doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu tahs weenam no
teem Dehleem/ to Israêta Behr-
nu Ziltu / par Seewahm isdoh-
tas taptu / tad taptu winnu Ih-
paschnms no ta Ihpatchuma
muhto Tehwu atrauta/ un tahs
Zilts Ihpaſchumam peelikta/kurp
tahs nahktu / un muhsa Ihpa-
schuna
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
